raw.subject: Something I noticed about American Towing & Roadside
raw.body:
Hi,

Love the post where you shared that you're always there for your customers. It's clear how much you care about serving your community in Stanton.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for customers to find and book your services when they need them most.

I took a look at your Facebook photos and posts, and I sketched out a simple homepage idea to help you showcase your services and make it easier for people to get back on the road.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/american-towing-roadside-stanton

This mockup includes a services menu, a work gallery to highlight your team's expertise, a clear booking CTA, and your hours and location front and center.

If you're interested in learning more about building out a site like this for your business, I'd be happy to chat with you about a flat fee for local businesses and answer any questions you may have. Feel free to reply to this email or give me a quick call to discuss further.
